review: Unable to add items to bag, required frequent cache clear or reinstall to use...

Updated to say that the app has been working fine since 2021. Though there was one time that I got charged twice for the same order. I had to uninstall the app in spring 2021 as it kept telling me I had an offer loaded, but there was no way to remove it and I could not see what the offer was. July 2021, the app has stopped working completely, it loads but then freezes and you can't order anything at all.
Lot of glitches related to pick up not being able to place my order and some time if you place a Mac delivery it converts it to pick up
